methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series A → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.0x) to $43M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Transportation (found 1 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 5 same-sector peers exist in Transportation, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

private.name: REGENT Craft
private.rationale: Same sector (Transportation), same stage (Series A), post-money $270M

data.narrative:
FleetZero is a Series A–stage transportation company founded by Steven Henderson and Mike Carter that has raised $43M to date. The valuation universe comprises eight private peers in the Transportation sector, including REGENT Craft, Rivian, The Boring Company, Einride, and Harbinger; no public comparables exist in this narrow segment.

Valuation was conducted using the Stage-Progression method, which applies a 2.0x step-up multiplier typical of Series A advancement to the $43M total raised as a proxy for current intrinsic value. This yields an implied valuation of $86M. The Peer-Median approach was not applicable due to insufficient same-stage and adjacent-stage comparables within the transportation sector—only one same-stage peer met criteria, falling below the minimum threshold of three datapoints required for reliable median derivation. Expanding to all Transportation sector peers would introduce material heterogeneity bias and was therefore excluded.

The triangulated analysis supports a valuation range of $73M (low) to $99M (high), with a median point estimate of $86M. This single-method support base reflects the narrow peer set available for cross-validation. Key uncertainties include FleetZero's specific unit economics relative to the broader Transportation sector, capital efficiency relative to peers, and market timing—factors difficult to isolate without access to same-stage comparable transaction data or audited financial performance metrics.
